eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CIVIL EMERGENCY MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Jackson, OR; at 6:53 PM on JUN 14, 2026 Effective until 9:53 AM JUN 15, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: A LEVEL 1 BE READY to evacuate CONTINUES for JAC-436 near near 500 block Spencer gulch road
